Alright, in this video I'm going to show you how to set up your conversions and stuff, yeah, and stuff inside of your new Google account and we're going to do it using Google Tag Manager. So if you have not created a Google Tag Manager account yet and if you haven't put your Google Tag Manager code on your web pages yet, watch our training on how to do that. It makes everything a billion times easier. The reason we want to do stuff through Google Tag Manager is because when you use Google Tag Manager you just have this one snippet of code that goes on like every one of your web pages ever and then you can manage all sorts of tracking from within this little interface that you see here and you don't have to keep adding stuff to all of your individual web pages because that's a pain in the butt, right? So again, if you haven't set up Google Tag Manager, it's easy, it's cutting and pasting. So watch the video on how to set up your account, get your Google Tag Manager code and slap it on all your web pages. So I'm assuming you've done that, okay?
